name: Addressing Limited Data in Auditory Attention Decoding with Diffusion Generative Models
summary: arXiv:2607.18345v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Limited training data constrains deep learning models for Auditory Attention Decoding (AAD) in hearing aids (HAs). AAD uses electroencephalogram (E...
description: arXiv:2607.18345v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Limited training data constrains deep learning models for Auditory Attention Decoding (AAD) in hearing aids (HAs). AAD uses electroencephalogram (EEG) data to decode listener's attention, enabling real-time tracking of specific sound sources. However, achieving high AAD performance with short time windows typical in HAs (<=1s) is challenging...
author: David Rannaleet, Victor Gunnarsson, Bo Bernhardsson, Martin A. Skoglund, Emina Alickovic
